name: pid_controller
description: PID 控制器（工程自定义版本，已调整默认参数）
templateCode:
pid = pid_controller(
    name = "自定义PID",
    kp = 2.0,
    ki = 0.2,
    kd = 0.02,
    setpoint = 60.0,
    input = pressure_sensor,
    output = valve_output
);

name: custom_sensor
description: 自定义传感器（工程新增）
templateCode:
custom_sensor = analog_input(
    channel = 10,
    name = "自定义传感器",
    unit = "V",
    min_value = 0.0,
    max_value = 10.0
);
